title: sorghastrum nutans subsp. pellitum
intro: Sorghastrum nutans subsp. pellitum, also known as Yellow Indiangrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Sorghastrum nutans subsp. pellitum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
